Additional Questions

Are you comfortable taking on tasks across all levels of technical support, from 1st line troubleshooting to 2nd and 3rd line issues involving more complex problem-solving?
Required
We heavily rely on Okta as a tool, so it’s important to us that you have had a good amount of experience using this tool. Are you confident with using Okta for enterprise environments? Required
Our Generalists manage, troubleshoot and configure our internal office networks. Do you have experience with enterprise network troubleshooting? Required
We’re proud to be a registered visa sponsor at Octopus Energy. We consider sponsorship on a case by case basis and while we're sorry we are not able to offer it for every role, understanding your right to work status helps us explore what options might be open for you. Could you please tell us what’s your current right to work status? Required

Submitting this application won’t change your LinkedIn profile.
